bullets: UNLEASH CREATIVITY - This Hot Wheels Monster Trucks Mega Marker Set comes with 42 pens plus stickers and stampers, making it perfect for hours of creative fun!
GREAT GIFT - This extensive stationery and activities set makes a great Birthday or Christmas gift for any Hot Wheels fan with a bright colourful box and a helpful carry handle!
OFFICIAL LICENSED HOT WHEELS SET - This official art set comes with an exclusive Hot Wheels colouring book to keep young fans busy.
Includes: 42 x Pens, 2 x Card Cars, 2 x Ink Stampers, 1 x Ink Pad, 1 x Colouring Book, 4 x Sticker Sheets
content.description: Monster collection of Hot Wheels Monster Trucks markers for creative projects all in novelty Bone Shaker shaped carry case!

attributes.whats_in_box: 42 x Pens, 2 x Card Cars, 2 x Ink Stampers, 1 x Ink Pad, 1 x Colouring Book, 4 x Sticker Sheets

compliance.choking_hazard: Yes - Small Parts; Warning label on product packaging.
